@@ -34,6 +34,34 @@ If you prefer a closed component composition, check out the
 
 :::
 
+## Shortcuts
+
+The `Checkbox` component also provides a set of shortcuts for common use cases.
+
+### CheckboxControl
+
+The `Checkbox.Control` renders the `Checkbox.Indicator` within it by default.
+
+This works:
+
+```tsx
+<Checkbox.Root>
+  <Checkbox.HiddenInput />
+  <Checkbox.Control>
+    <Checkbox.Indicator />
+  </Checkbox.Control>
+</Checkbox.Root>
+```
+
+This might be more concise, if you don't need to customize the indicator:
+
+```tsx
+<Checkbox.Root>
+  <Checkbox.HiddenInput />
+  <Checkbox.Control />
+</Checkbox.Root>
+```
+
 ## Examples
 
 ### Variants

@@ -26,8 +27,52 @@ import { RatingGroup } from "@chakra-ui/react"
 </RatingGroup.Root>
 ```
 
+:::info
+
+If you prefer a closed component composition, check out the
+[snippet below](#closed-component).
+
+:::
+
+## Shortcuts
+
+The `Rating` component also provides a set of shortcuts for common use cases.
+
+### RatingControl
+
+By default, the `RatingControl` shortcut renders the number of rating items
+specified in the `count` prop.
+
+This works:
+
+```tsx
+<RatingGroup.Root count={5}>
+  <RatingGroup.HiddenInput />
+  <RatingGroup.Control>
+    {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, index) => (
+      <RatingGroup.Item key={index} index={index + 1}>
+        <RatingGroup.ItemIndicator />
+      </RatingGroup.Item>
+    ))}
+  </RatingGroup.Control>
+</RatingGroup.Root>
+```
+
+This might be more concise, if you don't need to customize the rating icons:
+
+```tsx
+<RatingGroup.Root count={5}>
+  <RatingGroup.HiddenInput />
+  <RatingGroup.Control />
+</RatingGroup.Root>
+```
+
 ## Examples
 
+### Basic
+
+<ExampleTabs name="rating-basic" />
+
 ### Sizes
 
 Use the `size` prop to change the size of the rating component.

 :::
 
+## Shortcuts
+
+The `Switch` component also provides a set of shortcuts for common use cases.
+
+### SwitchControl
+
+The `Switch.Control` renders the `Switch.Thumb` within it by default.
+
+This works:
+
+```tsx
+<Switch.Root>
+  <Switch.HiddenInput />
+  <Switch.Control>
+    <Switch.Thumb />
+  </Switch.Control>
+</Switch.Root>
+```
+
+This might be more concise, if you don't need to customize the thumb:
+
+```tsx
+<Switch.Root>
+  <Switch.HiddenInput />
+  <Switch.Control />
+</Switch.Root>
+```
+
